actions.name: Read Clipboard
actions.notes: Reads user clipboard content. Review data handling and write-back behavior.
actions.remediation: Declare clipboard.read and document the clipboard data lifecycle.

actions.name: Write Clipboard
actions.notes: Mutates clipboard content. Review user intent and reversibility.
actions.remediation: Declare clipboard.write and explain whether the mutation is reversible.

actions.name: Network Request
actions.notes: May transmit data off device. Require destination and data class review.
actions.remediation: Declare network.allowed, list allowed domains, and describe data egress.

actions.name: Run Shell Script
actions.notes: Can execute arbitrary commands. Strict mode requires explicit review.
actions.remediation: Avoid shell execution where possible; otherwise require explicit declaration and two-reviewer approval.

actions.name: AI Model Action
actions.notes: Review provider, data classes, device boundary, prompt data, and output handling.
actions.remediation: Declare ai.uses_model_action and classify the model provider/device boundary.

actions.name: URL Scheme Callback
actions.notes: URL schemes can invoke other apps or leak state through callback URLs.
actions.remediation: Declare every URL scheme and explain callback data handling.
